name: Connections & Geodesics
description: ∇ connection, parallel transport. Geodesic ∇_γ' γ'=0. Exponential map. Hopf–Rinow.

graph TD
    D1["Def: Connection ∇\n∇_X Y cov derivative"]
    D2["Def: Parallel transport\n∇_γ' V=0"]

    T3["Thm: Hopf–Rinow\ncompl⇔geod complete"]
